examples: Usually, you would just sit listlessly, too hot to do anything else.
The teacher nods and puts Vishal back on the floor, where he sits listlessly before a jigsaw puzzle.
Huck was sitting on the gunwale of a flatboat, listlessly dangling his feet in the water and looking very melancholy.
On the other end of the floor, the Nets stood listlessly, not talking, distant.
In one hand (a hand resting listlessly against his right temple) he is holding a cigarette.
